text: O Ňč…Ē o bon…Ē…Ē waa t…Ē sie la be Ňč…Ē, ‚ÄúD…õ n d…Ē…Ē Es…Ē cheme d…õ b…Ē…Ēre Ňč…Ē he d…Ē…Ēree umeo? Leperaa h…õ…õ kaa l…Ē? Ume kond…õ…õraa he kp…Ē d…õ…õ kaa laa,
translated: He said to the one who was sitting on the tree, "What are you doing sitting on the tree like that? Are you a leper or what? Come down and let us go home."
